extract: Poliwag (Japanese: ニョロモ Nyoromo) is a Water-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves into Poliwhirl starting at level 25, which evolves into Poliwrath when exposed to a Water Stone or Politoed when traded while holding a King's Rock. (Specifics may differ in past games. Refer to Game data→Evolution data for these details.)
